title: CMG:SS
description: Metal styled texture pack for Create and related mods
body: Download instructions: * **I use Neoforge or Fabric 1.21.1** * Download CMGSS 2.0.0 neoforge * **I use Forge or Fabric on 1.18.2/1.19.2/1.20.1** * Download CMGSS 2.0.0 forge * **I use Forge or Fabric on 1.20.1 with Create 6** * Download CMGSS 2.0.0 forge **and undefined** CMGPP Create 6 extension**. Put the extension __above__ main file in resource pack menu** * **I want to download CMG: Parade Protocol** * Visit CMG: Parade Protocol * **I want to remove glue from mechanical bearings** * In addition to main file, download no glue extension. **Put the extension __above__ main file in resource pack menu** ## Without CMG ![Without CMG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qKfTn3kW/images/42fc0d87106120f000e64cff4f748955b9da0899.webp) ## With CMG:SS ![With CMG:SS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qKfTn3kW/images/3d7470a6b94888f4470d42c123dc842ff27ee101.webp) styled for metal Currently changes textures of these mods (not all textures): - CBC: Modern Warfare - Clockwork: Create x Valkyrien Skies - Control Craft - Create - Create Aeronautics - Create Big Cannons - Create Crafts & Additions - Create Optical - Create: Connected - Create: Design n' Decor - Create: Diesel Generators - Create: Dreams n' Desires - Create: Enchantment Industry - Create: More Drill Heads - Create: No Touching - Create: Propulsion - Create: Radars - Create: Ratatouille - Create: Things & Misc - Create: Tweaked Controllers - Drive-By-Wire - Petrol's Parts - Starlance - Trackwork - Valkyrien Skies 2 - VMod - VS: Tournament - And some Minecraft textures Uses some of TFMG's textures for some blocks like: pipes, fluid tanks, spout, andesite casing (part from TFMG is darker than original), controller hubs (heavy casing texture). Texture pack does not cause lags. **[CMG Discord](https://discord.gg/nnCBSCZ2R5)** **Feel free to contact my Discord: blackeagleyt** **Also my YouTube if needed: www.youtube.com/@BlackeagleYT64**
